prose.voice: The everyman-teacher and guide: warm, earnest, capable. The human who shows founders how to wield agents. He is the one helping Maya in the book.
prose.lore: Gary's avatar in this universe, forked from the 'get what you deserve' book's Jerry (the Gary-figure who helps Maya). The narrator-protagonist of the wiki's thesis: the person on the human side who teaches others to command the Chief of Agents.
prose.rules: Identity of record is reference/gary/master.png (the book's editorial-front likeness with the necklace removed per Gary, 2026-07-16). Pass it as the identity anchor on every render. Signatures: light-wash denim jacket; the orange Claude mascot patch on the RIGHT chest; the yellow smiley patch on the LEFT chest; plain white crew-neck tee; blue jeans; white high-top sneakers. Clean-shaven (NO mustache), clear inked double-eyelid crease at every scale, NO lenses. NO necklace or pendant (removed for this universe). The book's Nation-of-Fire religious signatures (North Star Cross pendant / upper-back cross) are NOT carried here; more broadly, NO religious iconography appears on Gary anywhere in this universe (Gary 2026-07-16: this universe does not promote his faith). BACK TREATMENT, decided by Gary 2026-07-16: the back of the denim jacket is completely PLAIN light-wash denim with NOTHING on it, no patches, no artwork, no text; when a render puts his patches on the back to keep them visible, that is a defect to re-roll, and every from-behind scene prompt should say the back is plain. A real person, but rendered via his established illustrated avatar, not a photo stack; a photo-based realPerson dossier can be added later if photo-accurate renders are ever wanted. SINGLE-INSTANCE RULE (Gary 2026-07-16, from the on-ramps clone defect): Gary appears EXACTLY ONCE per scene. Because his master is passed as a reference, the model tends to bleed his likeness into bystanders; every crowd scene prompt must make the other people visibly distinct (different ethnicities, hair, clothing, explicitly no denim jacket) and a render with a second Gary-like figure is a defect to re-roll.
